enum_values.name: MainFlash
enum_values.description: Main Flash memory mapped at 0x0000_0000

enum_values.name: SystemFlash
enum_values.description: System Flash memory mapped at 0x0000_0000

enum_values.name: SRAM
enum_values.description: Embedded SRAM mapped at 0x0000_0000

enum_values.name: QUADSPI
enum_values.description: QUADSPI memory mapped at 0x0000_0000

fields.name: I2C3_FMP
fields.description: I2C3 Fast-mode Plus driving capability activation

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: FM+ mode is controlled by I2C_Pxx_FMP bits only

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: FM+ mode is enabled on all I2C3 pins selected through selection bits in GPIOx_AFR registers

fields.name: I2C1_FMP
fields.description: I2C1 Fast-mode Plus driving capability activation

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: FM+ mode is controlled by I2C_Pxx_FMP bits only

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: FM+ mode is enabled on all I2C1 pins selected through selection bits in GPIOx_AFR registers

fields.name: I2C_PB9_FMP
fields.description: Fast-mode Plus (Fm+) driving capability activation on PB9

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: PB9 pin operate in standard mode

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: I2C FM+ mode enabled on PB9 and the Speed control is bypassed

fields.name: I2C_PB8_FMP
fields.description: Fast-mode Plus (Fm+) driving capability activation on PB8

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: PB8 pin operate in standard mode

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: I2C FM+ mode enabled on PB8 and the Speed control is bypassed

fields.name: I2C_PB7_FMP
fields.description: Fast-mode Plus (Fm+) driving capability activation on PB7

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: PB7 pin operate in standard mode

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: I2C FM+ mode enabled on PB7 and the Speed control is bypassed

fields.name: I2C_PB6_FMP
fields.description: Fast-mode Plus (Fm+) driving capability activation on PB6

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: PB6 pin operate in standard mode

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: I2C FM+ mode enabled on PB6 and the Speed control is bypassed

fields.name: BOOSTEN
fields.description: I/O analog switch voltage booster enable

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: I/O analog switches are supplied by VDDA voltage. This is the recommended configuration when using the ADC in high VDDA voltage operation

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: I/O analog switches are supplied by a dedicated voltage booster (supplied by VDD). This is the recommended configuration when using the ADC in low VDDA voltage operation

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Invalid operation interrupt enable

enum_values.name: Idle
enum_values.description: No SRAM2 or PKA RAM erase operation is ongoing

enum_values.name: Busy
enum_values.description: SRAM2 and/or PKA RAM erase operation is ongoing

enum_values.name: Erase
enum_values.description: Start SRAM2 erase operation

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: CPU2 fetch from SRAM1, SRAM2a and SRAM2b enabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: CPU2 fetch from SRAM1, SRAM2a and SRAM2b disabled

enum_values.name: Nominal
enum_values.description: No SRAM2 parity error detected

enum_values.name: Error
enum_values.description: SRAM2 parity error detected

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear SRAM2 parity error flag

enum_values.name: Disconnected
enum_values.description: ECC error disconnected from TIM1/16/17 break input

enum_values.name: Connected
enum_values.description: ECC error connected to TIM1/16/17 break input

enum_values.name: Connect
enum_values.description: Connect ECC error to TIM1/16/17 break input

enum_values.name: Disconnected
enum_values.description: PVD interrupt disconnected from TIM1/16/17 break input. PVDE and PLS[2:0] bits can be programmed by the application

enum_values.name: Connected
enum_values.description: PVD interrupt connected to TIM1/16/17 break input. PVDE and PLS[2:0] bits are read only

enum_values.name: Connect
enum_values.description: Connect PVD interretup to TIM1/16/17 break input

enum_values.name: Disconnected
enum_values.description: SRAM2 parity error signal disconnected from TIM1/16/17 break input

enum_values.name: Connected
enum_values.description: SRAM2 parity error signal connected to TIM1/16/17 break input

enum_values.name: Connect
enum_values.description: Connect SRAM2 parity error signal to TIM1/16/17 break input

enum_values.name: Disconnected
enum_values.description: CPU LOCKUP output disconnected from TIM1/16/17 break input

enum_values.name: Connected
enum_values.description: CPU LOCKUP output connected to TIM1/16/17 break input

enum_values.name: Connect
enum_values.description: Connect CPU LOCKUP output to TIM1/16/17 break input

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: SRAM2 1 KB page protection disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: SRAM2 1 KB page protection enabled

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: SRAM2 1 KB page protection disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: SRAM2 1 KB page protection enabled

fields.name: KEY

enum_values.name: WriteProtect
enum_values.description: Activate SRAM2ER bits write protection

enum_values.name: Step2
enum_values.description: Step 2 to remove SRAM2ER bits write protection

enum_values.name: Step1
enum_values.description: Step 1 to remove SRAM2ER bits write protection

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: SRAM2 1 KB page protection disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: SRAM2 1 KB page protection enabled
